headline: Congresswoman Who Bought No Stocks In 2025 Is Back With More 2026 Trades: Here's The Shopping List
summary: After not buying or selling any stocks in 2025, a congresswoman who made over $2.4 million in trades in 2024 is buying stocks once again in 2026. Here's a look at the latest transactions. Congresswoman Buys More Stocks Rep. Maria...
